name: Tazapay Global Cross-Border B2B Payments API
what_it_does: Tazapay global cross-border B2B payment REST API for businesses to send and receive international payments, collect local payments in 173+ countries, and manage trade payment workflows with escrow, milestones, and compliance for global commerce and trade finance automation. Enables AI agents to manage cross-border payment initiation for global B2B payment automation, handle local currency collection in 173+ countries for global commerce automation, access escrow payment and milestone release for trade finance automation, retrieve FX rate and conversion for multi-currency business automation, manage payment link creation for global B2B invoice automation, handle payment status tracking for international trade confirmation automation, access bank transfer and card acceptance for global payment method automation, retrieve KYC and compliance workflow for B2B onboarding automation, manage multi-currency wallet for global treasury automation, and integrate Tazapay with global e-commerce, marketplace, and B2B platforms for end-to-end cross-border payment automation.
use_cases: Sending cross-border B2B payments from global trade automation agents
Collecting local payments in 173+ countries from global commerce agents
Managing escrow payment releases from trade finance milestone agents
Automating global invoice payments from B2B accounts payable agents
not_for: Consumer P2P transfers (use Wise or Paysend for consumer remittance)
High-frequency low-value micropayments (Tazapay is B2B trade payment focused)
best_when: A B2B platform, marketplace, or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate cross-border trade payments, local currency collection in 173+ countries, and escrow payment workflows through Tazapay's global trade payment infrastructure.
avoid_when: KYC AND COMPLIANCE ONBOARDING REQUIRED: Tazapay B2B payment requires buyer and seller KYC verification; automated payment initiation must complete KYC workflow for both parties; automated payment without KYC completion creates compliance rejection for international trade. FX RATE LOCK WINDOW: Tazapay FX rates are time-limited; automated payment must execute within rate lock window after quote; automated rate reuse after lock expiry creates rate changed error requiring new quote. ESCROW MILESTONE CONFIGURATION COMPLEXITY: Tazapay escrow payments require milestone configuration before payment initiation; automated escrow setup must define milestone conditions and release triggers; automated escrow without milestone configuration creates unstructured payment without release mechanism. SETTLEMENT TIME BY CORRIDOR: International settlement times vary by corridor (1-5 business days); automated trade finance workflows must account for settlement window; automated immediate settlement assumption for cross-border payment creates cash flow planning error.

auth.notes: Tazapay uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ. Founded 2021 by Rahul Shinghal and Arpit Gupta. Backed by Sequoia Capital Southeast Asia, Saison Capital, Integra Partners ($17M raised). Products: Cross-border payments, local collection (173+ countries), escrow, FX, payment links. SDKs: Python, Node.js, PHP. MAS-licensed. GDPR. Competes with Airwallex and Wise Business for cross-border B2B.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — business account registration required
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fees: 0.5-2% per payment depending on corridor and method; no monthly fee
pricing.notes: Singapore SG. Sequoia SEA backed. Per-transaction fees. MAS-licensed. Business account required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and FX APIs throttled; webhooks for payment and escrow events

known_agent_gotchas: ACCOUNT CREATION BEFORE PAYMENT: Tazapay requires creating buyer and seller account objects before payment initiation; automated payment workflow must create account entities first; automated direct payment initiation without account creation creates account not found error

ESCROW STATE MACHINE MANAGEMENT: Tazapay escrow payments follow state machine (created → funded → milestone_completed → released); automated escrow management must track and trigger state transitions; automated immediate fund release assumption creates escrow in wrong state

KYC VERIFICATION ASYNC COMPLETION: Tazapay KYC verification is not instant; automated B2B onboarding must poll KYC status before initiating payment; automated immediate payment after KYC submission creates payment blocked on KYC pending

LOCAL COLLECTION PAYMENT METHOD PER COUNTRY: Tazapay local collection methods vary by country (bank transfer in some, card in others); automated checkout must query available methods per collection country; automated static method assumption creates unavailable method for specific countries

FX CONVERSION RATE TRANSPARENCY: Tazapay FX includes spread in quoted rate; automated cost modeling must request FX quote before committing to payment amount; automated assumption of mid-market rate for cost calculation creates actual cost higher than expected
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cross-border B2B. GDPR, MAS-licensed. API key. SG. Trade payment and KYC data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cross-border B2B. GDPR, MAS. API key. SG. Trade and payment data.
